summary: Great recording of a surprisingly strong show despite the venue’s poor acoustics
review: The reviewer finds this performance far better than remembered and praises the recording as “great,” noting that it overcomes the notoriously bad acoustics at the 4C's venue. No specific songs or band‑member moments are called out, but the overall tone is enthusiastic and positive.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review (4 ★) highlights a strong show and good recording quality; limited data reduces confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer calls the recording great, implying clear and listenable sound despite venue acoustic issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No detailed comments on set structure; reviewer simply states the show exceeded expectations.
